description: Androgyny is the trend of the day. These patent shoes from catwalk are perfect for this look with its smartly cut design. The cut-out patterns add a relaxed touch to the shoe. UpperSynthetic leather upper with overlays at the heel cup and toe box Central lace-ups for a customised FitSoft lining and padded sockliner for instep comfortCut-out floral design on the midfoot and forefoot regionOutsoleNon-slip TPU outsole with mild grooves and upraised heelShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
